signs.personality: Bold, energetic, courageous, and natural leaders. They love taking initiative and hate waiting.
Values stability, luxury, and comfort. Patient, reliable, and extremely stubborn.
Curious, witty, adaptable, and excellent communicators. Can be restless and inconsistent.
Deeply emotional, protective, intuitive, and family-oriented. Can be moody and sensitive.
Confident, dramatic, generous, and love being in the spotlight. Natural charisma.
Analytical, practical, perfectionists, and service-oriented. Great attention to detail.
Seeks balance, harmony, and beauty. Diplomatic, social, and hates conflict.
Intense, passionate, secretive, and transformative. Incredible willpower.
Adventurous, optimistic, philosophical, and love freedom and travel.
Ambitious, disciplined, responsible, and excellent at long-term planning.
Innovative, independent, humanitarian, and think outside the box.
Compassionate, artistic, intuitive, and deeply empathetic. Can be escapist.
